---
id: perform-o-auth-2-device-verification-flow
title: "OAuth 2.0 Device Verification Endpoint"
description:
  "This is the device user verification endpoint. The user is redirected here when trying to log in using the device flow."
sidebar_label: "OAuth 2.0 Device Verification Endpoint"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"OAuth 2.0 Device Verification Endpoint"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/oauth2/device/verify"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This is the device user verification endpoint. The user is redirected here when trying to log in using the device flow.
